name: extract-parallel-claims
description: Locates and isolates the specific claim made in a source passage and the corresponding claim made by a student or external party on the same topic.
procedure: The analyst observes the source passage to locate the specific factual claim relevant to the topic in question.
The analyst observes the student's or external party's statement to locate their corresponding claim on the same topic.
when_to_use: When a student's or external claim needs to be checked against a source passage and the relevant statements must first be isolated before any comparison can occur.
constraints: Both claims must address the same topic or entity for extraction to be meaningful.
The source passage must contain an explicit statement on the topic, not merely an implication.

defects.description: Imprecise reference "the relevant" without enough info to locate
defects.suggestion: Replace "the relevant" with exact name, path, or section reference

defects.description: Vague operation "address" lacks depth or acceptance criteria
defects.suggestion: Replace "address" with a specific action and expected outcome

name: identify-factual-contradiction
description: Determines whether two extracted claims on the same topic contradict each other by distinguishing the key differing elements and comparing them.
procedure: The analyst distinguishes the specific factual element in the student's claim from the corresponding factual element in the source passage (e.g., a name, date, or category).
The analyst compares the two factual elements to determine whether they are consistent or contradictory.
when_to_use: When two parallel claims on the same topic have been extracted and the analyst needs to determine whether they agree or conflict.
constraints: The comparison must be between claims on the same attribute or relationship.
A contradiction requires that the two claims cannot both be true simultaneously.

defects.description: Procedure has no observation step -- actions should begin with observing the input
defects.suggestion: Add an initial step that observes/reads/scans the input

defects.description: Passive voice: "been extracted" hides the actor
defects.suggestion: Rewrite "been extracted" to name the actor explicitly

name: render-contradiction-verdict
description: Produces a final correctness judgment by applying the identified contradiction (or consistency) to evaluate the external claim against the authoritative source.
procedure: The analyst applies the result of the factual comparison to render a verdict on whether the student's or external claim is correct or incorrect according to the source passage.
when_to_use: When a factual comparison between a source claim and an external claim has been completed and a final judgment must be stated.
constraints: The verdict must be grounded solely in the source passage, not external knowledge.
The verdict must explicitly state what the correct information is according to the source.

defects.description: Procedure has no observation step -- actions should begin with observing the input
defects.suggestion: Add an initial step that observes/reads/scans the input

defects.description: Passive voice: "been completed" hides the actor
defects.suggestion: Rewrite "been completed" to name the actor explicitly
